variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 60160 Hydraulic Filter | Replaces the Volvo SA1141-00010
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 60160 Hydraulic Filter | Replaces the Volvo SA1141-00010
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SH 60160 Hydraulic Filter is HiFi's replacement to the Volvo SA1141-00010. Easy to install and replace, the SH 60160 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 200.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 97.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M10X1,5, Height 1 (H1): 95.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 90.0 mm, Style: Hydraulic Filter
